info.title: OpenApi MediatR Response Matcher
info.description: A .NET tool to automatically detect mismatches between ASP.NET Core controller ActionResult return types and MediatR handler response types. Helps maintain consistency between Swagger documentation and actual API responses.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A tool to detect mismatches between controller action return types and MediatR handler response types.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project root (default: current directory)

options.name: --controllers
options.description: Path to controllers directory (auto-detected if not specified)

options.name: --handlers
options.description: Path to handlers directory (auto-detected if not specified)

options.name: --executor
options.description: Add custom MediatR executor method name (e.g., "ProcessCommand")
